sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value Float64, precision_val Decimal(10, 5), str_value String);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, precision_val, str_value) VALUES (1, 27.0, 0.004, '27'), (2, 64.0, 0.01234, '64'), (3, NULL, NULL, 'NULL'), (4, 1.0, 0.00001, '1.0');
SELECT id, cbrt(value) * precision_val AS result FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, cbrt(value + 1) * cbrt(value) AS combined_result FROM test_table WHERE value >= 0;
SELECT id, cbrt(value) * (precision_val + cbrt(value)) AS nested_result FROM test_table;
SELECT id, cbrt(COALESCE(value, 1.0) * precision_val) AS cbrt_product FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL HAVING cbrt_product > 0;
SELECT id, cbrt(value) AS root_value, (SELECT AVG(precision_val) FROM test_table WHERE precision_val IS NOT NULL) AS avg_precision FROM test_table;
SELECT t1.id, t1.value, t2.value * cbrt(t1.value) AS multiplied_cbrt FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t2.value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, cbrt(value) * 10 AS scaled_cbrt FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING scaled_cbrt > 4;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, precision_val, str_value) VALUES (5, -1.0, 0.001, '-1.0'), (6, 0.0, 0.0, '0');
SELECT id, value, cbrt(value) * precision_val AS complex_interaction FROM test_table WHERE str_value NOT LIKE '';
SELECT id, cbrt(COALESCE(value, -1)) * (cbrt(value) + 1) AS final_result FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, value, cbrt(cbrt(value)) * value AS double_nested_cbrt FROM test_table WHERE precision_val IS NOT NULL ORDER BY double_nested_cbrt DESC;
